Ethereum Price Up Today | YES | LOW confidence**[1][5][7]

Ethereum (ETH) rose **$98.74** to **$2,403.78** as of 9:15 a.m. ET on April 22, 2026 (1:15 p.m. UTC), confirming a **4.3% daily gain** from April 21's $2,305.04 close and reversing two days of declines ($2,317.80 on April 20).[1][2][3]

signals.headline: Wembanyama Concussion Rules Him Out After Game 2 Fall vs
signals.raw:
Wembanyama Concussion Rules Him Out After Game 2 Fall vs. Trail Blazers | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Victor Wembanyama, Spurs' MVP finalist and rookie standout, suffered a concussion in Game 2 of their Western Conference semifinal series against the Trail Blazers and was ruled out immediately after exiting, shifting series odds heavily toward Portland[3][4].
